subcodes.first_line: Say: O Lord of Destiny and Sovereign of humanity! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Scene, the Station wherein every hidden Command was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا مالک القدر و سلطان البشر اسئلک بالمنظر الاکبر المقام الذی فیه ظهر کل امر مستتر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
